canonical_policy: Keep SpectralSnapshotV1, the analytic activation-side estimator, and AbsoluteSpectralTargetGateV1 as diagnostic/governance owners. Spectral observables cannot influence champion selection, promotion, or production configuration unless a future versioned disposition reaches adopt_primary.

entries.applicable_scope: data-free matrix diagnostics by exact role, shape, dtype, and initializer
entries.falsifier: Synthetic controls do not separate, aliases double count, or null identity is missing.
entries.hypothesis: Native SVD statistics with same-shape nulls separate synthetic controls without raw-alpha folklore.
entries.rationale: The canonical owner validates deterministic native statistics, synthetic controls, null keys, role classification, and tied-storage deduplication. It makes no quality or ship claim.
entries.required_action: Retain as the canonical inspection API; require null evidence beside raw alpha.

entries.falsifier: Same-shape random nulls reproduce or shift the apparent target.
entries.hypothesis: Raw fitted alpha, especially alpha near 2, identifies model quality or criticality.
entries.rationale: The 128x128, 256x128, and 512x128 Gaussian-null means are strongly shape-dependent; proximity to 2 is not positive evidence.
entries.required_action: Reject raw-alpha promotion features and require null-calibrated observables.

entries.applicable_scope: committed checkpoint families with exact compatible provenance
entries.falsifier: Coverage is incomplete or predictive relations vanish under role/shape controls.
entries.hypothesis: Null-calibrated checkpoint spectra predict non-floor protected outcomes.
entries.rationale: The atlas wiring works, but committed compatible checkpoint/outcome coverage is insufficient for prediction.
entries.required_action: Revisit only after a provenance-complete checkpoint family exists.

entries.falsifier: Effects are step-confounded, null-like, or unavailable on durable checkpoints.
entries.hypothesis: Batch and data scale create reproducible null-calibrated spectral departures.
entries.rationale: The measured scratch matrix is useful negative-boundary evidence but is inconclusive and blocks optimizer, semantic, promotion, and ship claims.
entries.required_action: Keep the report replayable; do not route it into training defaults.

entries.applicable_scope: exact-state activation covariance with compatible checkpoint manifests
entries.falsifier: No compatible checkpoint/state manifest or controls do not separate.
entries.hypothesis: W Sigma^(1/2) spectra identify decision-kind-specific functional geometry.
entries.rationale: Orientation and streaming covariance plumbing are validated only on fixtures; no compatible durable checkpoint plus DecisionEvent manifest exists.
entries.required_action: Retain the diagnostic owner but make no predictive or causal inference.

entries.falsifier: No complete checkpoint family or controls match the proposed geometry.
entries.hypothesis: Cross-attention bottlenecks or retained parent subspaces support protected decisions.
entries.rationale: Zero complete provenance-resolvable checkpoint families were available; no cross-attention role or retention target was nominated.
entries.required_action: Do not select retention targets from synthetic magnitudes.

entries.applicable_scope: optional pinned WeightWatcher stable-rank parity diagnostics
entries.falsifier: The two implementations disagree beyond numerical tolerance.
entries.hypothesis: Pinned WeightWatcher stable rank agrees with the native canonical owner.
known_confounds: alpha parity is not quality evidence
entries.rationale: WeightWatcher 0.7.5 completed 18 comparisons with maximum stable-rank absolute error 8.527e-14. Its fitted alpha remains descriptive only.
entries.required_action: Keep WeightWatcher pinned and optional; use native metrics as the canonical owner.

entries.falsifier: Warnings do not lead protected regressions or controls warn equally.
entries.hypothesis: Spikes/traps precede continuation collapse under a preregistered warning rule.
entries.rationale: One seed/family and one transient collapse provide no independent non-collapse false-positive denominator; the report explicitly does not support an operational early-stop rule.
entries.required_action: Retain the report for research replay; forbid operational early stopping or promotion decisions.

entries.applicable_scope: analytic fixtures and future exact-state checkpoint families
entries.falsifier: Exact/JVP estimators disagree or null controls fail.
entries.hypothesis: Activation-side restriction energy measures causal support in the mathematically valid orientation.
known_confounds: analytic labels are not model evidence
entries.rationale: Analytic exact/JVP/Hutchinson contracts pass, but the current-model retrospective is rejected and nominates no eligible bands.
entries.required_action: Keep the estimator; require a provenance-complete family before model use.

entries.applicable_scope: frozen checkpoint and preregistered eligible bands
entries.hypothesis: Singular values, vectors, or bands have reproducible local causal effects.
entries.rationale: No eligible perturbation bands or provenance-resolvable frozen checkpoint/state family exists, so the battery could not start.
entries.required_action: Reopen only after the causal estimator nominates nonempty frozen targets.

entries.falsifier: Matched quality/cost outcomes do not improve.
entries.hypothesis: Muon improves convergence/protected outcomes over matched AdamW.
entries.rationale: Only a two-step fixture validates partitioning; no matched convergence, protected, downstream, or GPU evidence exists.
entries.required_action: Keep optional wiring default-off; do not call it the strongest baseline.

entries.falsifier: Ordering is unsupported or controls match.
entries.hypothesis: Null-calibrated relative LR/decay ordering beats permuted and time-shifted controls.
entries.rationale: The regime gate is inconclusive, no causal mechanism exists, and no qualified AdamW/Muon control exists; the tournament was not authorized.
entries.required_action: Do not add a controller until a future versioned gate authorizes exact roles.

entries.applicable_scope: winning relative spectral policy with protected geometry
entries.falsifier: No supported spectral ordering or mechanism remains.
entries.hypothesis: Verifier need and conflict gates make spectral LR allocation safer.
entries.rationale: SLM-223 supplied no winning spectral direction or controller state, so layering verifier policy was explicitly not applicable.
entries.required_action: No implementation; reopen only after qualified spectral ordering.

entries.falsifier: No reproducible singular-value, orientation, or band effect exists.
entries.hypothesis: Causal spectral retention improves the plasticity/retention frontier.
entries.rationale: SLM-221 produced no eligible causal target or frozen weights; implementing a penalty would select from synthetic magnitude or outcomes.
entries.required_action: Do not add retention code without a future causal result.

entries.falsifier: Raw alpha or one checkpoint can authorize a different role/shape.
entries.hypothesis: A versioned finite-size gate prevents null coincidences from authorizing correction.
entries.rationale: The 200-draw width study is descriptive-only, authorizes no roles/shapes, and its guard blocks every absolute intervention.
entries.required_action: Retain the gate and require it before any absolute-target manifest.

entries.applicable_scope: exact role/shape authorized by the absolute gate and causal target
entries.falsifier: The absolute gate or causal-shape prerequisite fails.
entries.hypothesis: Damped alpha/trace-log projection improves protected quality beyond controls.
entries.rationale: AbsoluteSpectralTargetGateV1 is descriptive-only with empty authorization and SLM-221 has no causal target; projection is not authorized.
entries.required_action: No projection implementation; the absolute gate remains authoritative.

executive_finding: The program adopts four fail-closed diagnostics and no training or production mechanism. Raw alpha, verifier-conditioned spectral LR, causal spectral retention, and WW-PGD/trace-log correction are rejected or blocked in the measured scope; negative evidence remains replayable.
